title: eleocharis elegans
intro: Eleocharis elegans, also known as the delicate spikesedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Eleocharis elegans include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and act as a diuretic. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent.
